name: legion-router
description: Legion's multi-model brain: delegate scoped tasks from Opus to external model agents (Codex / GPT-5.5 / GPT-5.4 and Cursor Agent) and bring back a verified, metered diff. Ships `legion-delegate` for Codex, `legion-cursor` for Cursor Agent headless runs, the `legion-router` loopback :8082 Anthropic-compatible metering proxy (claude-* / minimax-* pass-through + /ingest), plus the shared cost table and codex-json parser. One orchestrator, a legion of models.
